protocol_check.conclusion: batchexecute uses HTTP/3 (QUIC), NOT h2. Etap cannot intercept h3/QUIC traffic.

block_detection.response_content: Gemini responded with privacy advice about not sharing personal information
block_detection.etap_interception: NONE - request bypassed Etap via h3/QUIC

comparison_with_march20.explanation: Between 3/20 and 3/25, gemini.google.com batchexecute switched from h2 to h3/QUIC. This is why Etap could block on 3/20 but cannot intercept on 3/25.

result.warning_failure_reason: Etap proxy cannot intercept HTTP/3 (QUIC) traffic. batchexecute requests to gemini.google.com now use h3 protocol over UDP port 443, completely bypassing the Etap TLS interception proxy which only handles h2/TCP connections.

notes: CRITICAL: Gemini batchexecute switched from h2 to h3/QUIC. Etap CANNOT intercept this traffic. Sensitive data prompt was NOT blocked. To fix: need QUIC blocking or forced h2 downgrade at network level.
